CREATE TABLE sales (product_id INT, region_id INT, amount FLOAT);
SELECT product_id, region_id, SUM(amount) AS total_sales, GROUPING(product_id), GROUPING(region_id) FROM sales GROUP BY ROLLUP(product_id, region_id);
CREATE TABLE products (id INT, name VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO products VALUES (1, 'Product A'), (2, 'Product B');

SELECT p.name, s.region_id, SUM(s.amount) AS total_sales, GROUPING(p.id), GROUPING(s.region_id) FROM products p JOIN sales s ON p.id = s.product_id GROUP BY GROUPING SETS ((p.id, s.region_id), (p.id), (s.region_id));
CREATE TABLE regions (id INT, name VARCHAR);
SELECT r.name, SUM(s.amount) AS total_sales, GROUPING(r.id) FROM sales s JOIN regions r ON s.region_id = r.id GROUP BY ROLLUP(r.name);
SELECT COUNT(*), GROUPING(product_id) FROM sales GROUP BY product_id WITH ROLLUP;
SELECT product_id, COUNT(*) AS total_entries, GROUPING(product_id) FROM sales GROUP BY GROUPING SETS ((product_id), ());
SELECT p.name, COUNT(s.amount) AS count_sales, GROUPING(p.id) FROM products p LEFT JOIN sales s ON p.id = s.product_id GROUP BY ROLLUP(p.id);
